substrate_condition: clean, dark granular substrate visible beneath mesh bag and around equipment base; no visible debris accumulation
narrative: A well-equipped rear corner of Media Luna is on full display — dual sponge filters loaded with ceramic media balls, a submersible pump or powerhead, a teal thermometer, and what appears to be a large mesh bag of substrate or mineral media occupying the foreground. Dense, fine-leafed floating plants (likely frogbit or a similar species) carpet the surface overhead, looking lush and healthy. One small shrimp — appears juvenilish, translucent with a reddish tint — is visible on or near the mesh bag in the lower left foreground.
image_subject: rear equipment corner of tank with foreground mesh media bag, sponge filters, pump, thermometer, and surface plant coverage
